highlights: The AI agent landscape is rapidly evolving with significant advancements in world model planning, hallucination reduction, and collaborative network paradigms, aiming for more robust and reliable autonomous systems.

OpenAI continues to drive the frontier with the preview of its next-generation GPT-5.6 Sol model and strategic hardware partnerships for LLM inference, alongside major enterprise deployments of its existing AI tools.
The developer ecosystem is being enhanced by new tools that simplify LLM deployment, accelerate fine-tuning, and provide comprehensive frameworks for building and securing agentic applications.

agents.title: AI-Model Network: Concept, Current State and Future
agents.summary: This research introduces AI-ModelNet, a novel paradigm for interconnected and collaborative AI models, enabling capability sharing and reasoning pathways to address deployment complexities and high training costs of large models.

agents.title: Internalizing the Future: A Unified Agentic Training Paradigm for World Model Planning
agents.summary: A three-stage training paradigm is proposed to equip LLM agents with internal world models for 'what-if' reasoning, significantly improving performance in long-horizon sequential decision-making tasks by overcoming reactive limitations.

agents.title: Grounded Iterative Language Planning: How Parameterized World Models Reduce Hallucination Propagation in LLM Agents
agents.summary: Grounded Iterative Language Planning (GILP) is introduced, combining a parameterized world model backbone with LLM agent reasoning to drastically reduce hallucinated state rates and improve success in graph-structured planning tasks.

models.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
models.summary: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model showcasing enhanced capabilities in coding, scientific reasoning, and cybersecurity, coupled with its most advanced safety stack for reliable deployment.

models.title: Odyssey: Constructing Verifiable Local Truth-Preserving Foundation Models
models.summary: ODYSSEY is introduced as a categorical framework for building verifiable, local truth-preserving foundation models through composable 'foundries,' providing robust argumentation and factual grounding crucial for trustworthy AI.

models.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
models.summary: Google's research demonstrates its conversational AI system, AMIE, matches primary care physicians in managing complex health conditions, marking a significant advancement in AI for medical applications.

tools.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
tools.summary: OpenAI launches Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, designed to help organizations detect, validate, and remediate software vulnerabilities at scale, enhancing cybersecurity posture.

tools.title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
tools.summary: Hugging Face Jobs now enables users to easily deploy a vLLM server with a single command, streamlining the serving of large language models for developers and accelerating inference workflows.

tools.title: Build real agentic apps using CUGA: two dozen working examples on a lightweight harness
tools.summary: IBM Research introduces CUGA, a lightweight harness with two dozen working examples to facilitate the rapid development and deployment of real-world agentic applications, accelerating agent builder efforts.

companies.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
companies.summary: HP Inc. expands its strategic partnership with OpenAI, integrating AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations for widespread deployment and innovation across its business.

companies.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
companies.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce 'Jalapeño,' a custom AI chip specifically engineered for LLM inference, aiming to significantly enhance performance, efficiency, and scalability in AI systems.

companies.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
companies.summary: Samsung Electronics implements a major enterprise-wide deployment of ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to its global workforce, signifying significant corporate adoption of OpenAI's AI tools for productivity and innovation.

learning.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
learning.summary: This guide demonstrates how to leverage OpenAI's Codex to manage complex, long-running projects and preserve context effectively, enabling developers to scale their AI-assisted work beyond single prompts.

learning.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
learning.summary: A Google expert provides an explainer on the 'full-stack' approach to AI, detailing its importance and foundational role in Google's AI development efforts, offering valuable insights for aspiring AI professionals.

learning.title: Beyond LoRA: Can you beat the most popular fine-tuning technique?
learning.summary: This article explores advanced fine-tuning techniques beyond LoRA, offering developers and researchers insights to optimize model performance and potentially surpass current best practices in model adaptation.
